title: Mergers & Acquisitions
content:
## Mergers & Acquisitions
With expertise in the industries that matter most to the global business landscape, we have the proven experience to get deals done.
McCarthy Tétrault’s M&A team brings the right combination of expertise and experience to our clients’ most important and sophisticated cross-border and domestic transactions. By drawing on our top-ranked strength in Tax, Competition/Antitrust & Foreign Investment, and Banking & Financial Services, combined with industry-specific insights, we deliver practical solutions and ensure deals are executed seamlessly and successfully.

### Why Clients Choose Us
Significant experience advising a wide range of transaction participants, from emerging companies to global conglomerates and financial sponsors, in large and mid-market transactions, including acquisitions, sale processes, divestitures, carve-outs, joint ventures and special situations, and take-privates.
We are pioneers in the legal industry for our focus on developing industry-specific expertise amongst our lawyers, concentrating on industries that have strategic alignment with key sectors in the Canadian economy.
- Digital Infrastructure
- Retail and Consumer Products

#### Trusted Advice on Complex Issues
Often the first call for domestic and cross-border transactions that involve complex or novel issues. We specialize in advising clients on the largest and most market-defining deals, including special situations as well as corporate governance and regulatory matters.
Borderless service from our offices across Canada’s major commercial centres and in New York and London. We routinely work closely and in concert with leading law firms in the U.S., the U.K. and overseas.

#### Strategic and Practical
Commercial-minded, practical advice and deal-making with a relentless focus on managing risk, delivering value and getting the right deal done.
As entrepreneurial thinkers with a business mindset, we understand our clients’ businesses and focus on achieving their transaction objectives.

### Select Recent Experience
Acquisition of Turquoise Hill Resources
Acquisition of Sandstorm Gold
Acquisition of Elk Valley Resources from Teck Resources
Privatization of Inter Pipeline
Acquisition of three US-based utilities from Dominion Energy
Acquisition of MEG Energy
Acquisition by La Caisse
Acquisition of 53.12% stake in Neoen
Partnership with Brookfield Renewable to acquire Westinghouse Electric

#### Real Estate & Financial Services
Acquisition by JV between Dream Industrial REIT and GI
Acquisition of Canadian Western Bank
Acquisition of the Commercial Real Estate Business of Annaly Capital Management

#### Retail & Consumer Markets
Sale of its North American yogurt business to Lactalis and Sodiaal
Acquisition of core brands of The Bountiful Company to integrate into the Nestlé Health Science business line
Share exchange as part of take-private of Nuvei by Advent International
Investment in Rogers Communications
Investment in Vantage Data Centers
Acquisition of interests in Fontainebleau Aviation's fixed-based operators in Miami Opa-Locka and Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood Airports
Acquisition of Genesee & Wyoming
Acquisition of LOGISTEC
Acquisition of HomeServe
Buyout offer for Atlantia
Proposed acquisition by Ecolab of its electronics business

### Cross-Border M&A: Top 10 Considerations for U.S. Acquirers of Canadian Targets
Our market-leading M&A Group highlights the core issues, key considerations, pitfalls and opportunities for U.S. businesses and investors contemplating the acquisition of a Canadian target.

### Canadian Going Private Transactions
Understand the steps necessary to take a public company private from some of Canada’s leading transactional lawyers.
An overview of some of the principal Canadian corporate and securities law considerations that apply to special committees, with an emphasis on special committees appointed in connection with M&A transactions.

### The Mergers & Acquisitions Review, Sixteenth Edition – Canada chapter
The Canada chapter of the sixteenth edition of The Mergers & Acquisitions Review provides a practical overview of recent M&A activity and the legal and regulatory frameworks governing M&A transactions. Focusing on recent developments and emerging trends, this helpful publication examines key issues that can affect business, including relevant competition law considerations, foreign involvement, and more.
